style_authority.note: Uses adaptive product context and shared semantic authority without forcing identical platform UI.

reference_selection.note: Correctly selects iOS, Android, adaptive, accessibility, theming, motion, and validation guidance.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Focuses on native navigation, adaptivity, controls, accessibility, and trust rather than decorative redesign.

evidence_level.note: Labels the evidence static/prose-only and makes no source, build, simulator, emulator, hardware, accessibility-tree, or performance claim.

verified_boundary.note: Cleanly separates prompt-stated implementation facts from all unverified source locations, rendering, accessibility, windowing, gesture, and runtime behavior.

design_moves.note: Provides platform-specific navigation, size classes, targets, scalable type, semantic themes, native controls, accessible motion, and parity matrix.

scope_control.note: Stays concise at 119 lines, read-only, native-conformance focused, and within the requested limits.
